summary: R2 addresses the systems_architect REQUEST_CHANGES blocker. M4 FactionKnowledge canonical sorting now has complete stable tie-breakers for duplicate logical known-objective, route, supply, and defender estimate keys, so canonical state no longer depends on construction order. The M4 regression suite now proves duplicate-key estimates supplied in different orders canonicalize identically, and the RouteId test fixtures use parseRouteId instead of branded-ID fabrication.

tests_run.result: No remaining 'as never' branded-ID fabrication in the M4 campaign objectives test or touched sim-core file.
Focused M4 suite passed: 1 file, 7 tests. New regression covers duplicate-key FactionKnowledge estimates supplied in different orders canonicalizing identically.
Sim-core package suite passed: 15 files, 106 tests.
Protocol schema suite passed: 1 file, 8 tests.
Node and worker-compatible deterministic hashes matched: hello 61e0ba1c, command/query d275faa4, save/load 28074edd; save/load byte length 10920.
ESLint passed across configured project globs.
Architecture boundaries passed, determinism passed, root Vitest passed 26 files / 173 tests, and web package tests passed 1 file / 3 tests.
No forbidden real-time, random, DOM, React, Pixi, Electron, localStorage, or Node IO matches in sim-core source.

tests_run.command: node -e R2 handoff JSON parse/shape check
tests_run.result: R2 handoff parsed; task id, REVIEW status, systems_architect route, and empty blockers verified.

decisions: Chose deterministic duplicate-key canonicalization rather than duplicate rejection, because duplicate estimate observations can remain valid as long as every semantic field participates in stable ordering.
Known objective sorting now uses campaignPlanId, target, objectiveKind, confidenceBps, and sorted reasonCodes.
Route estimate sorting now uses routeId, fromDistrictId, toDistrictId, travelCostEstimate, capacityEstimate, and confidenceBps.
Supply estimate sorting now uses districtId, supplyMin, supplyMax, and confidenceBps.
Defender estimate sorting now uses target, defenderMin, defenderMax, and confidenceBps.
No muster, supply consumption, march execution, siege/combat, UI, save-format expansion, full diplomacy, rebellion, or manual battle behavior was added.
risks: R3 remains in effect because the original task changed protocol and authoritative sim-core state; this R2 change is limited to deterministic canonical ordering and tests.
Existing request-flow project state files were already modified when R2 began and were not changed by this fix.
requested_action: Review the R2 fix for deterministic duplicate-key FactionKnowledge canonical ordering and the RouteId fixture cleanup. Do not mark ACCEPTED or CLOSED until reviewer acceptance.
